Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Protective Order
Off Calendar Jul-26-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Lorraine P.Ocheltree, for Defendant/Moving Party Long & Levitt, LLP
Trinidad Cruz, for Opposing party Robin Pearson
Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Long and Levit, L.L.P.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Appearance And Testimony At Deposition is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to appear for deposition on July 28, 2006. The court finds that Plaintiff's failure to appear at deposition was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $1,750, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
